region: offer-specific (global, EU multi-region, or European regional endpoint)
method: Live scrape of the official Vertex AI / Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform pricing page via headless browser, cross-checked against official model endpoint-location pages. The 43-model roster and every token price are unchanged from 2026-07-07. Global endpoints remain region=global because Google explicitly provides no processing-location guarantee. Claude EU/europe-west1 and Gemini non-global rows retain their documented EU prices. Mistral Medium 3, Mistral Small 3.1 and Codestral 2 use the documented europe-west4 endpoint, where Google guarantees EU ML processing. GLM-5.2, Kimi K2.7, MiniMax-M3 and DeepSeek-V4 remain absent from the live pricing roster.

models.notes: Preview (labeled 'Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview'). Standard tier, <=200K input tokens; >200K tier is $4 in / $18 out. No non-global surcharge shown on the Gemini 3 table for Pro; Global pricing applies even in europe-west4. Cached input $0.20 (<=200K), $0.40 (>200K).

Non-global (EU) pricing, in effect from 2026-07-01; Global is $1.50 in / $9.00 out. Text/image/video/audio input. Flat across context length. Cached input $0.165 (non-global) / $0.15 (Global). From Gemini 3.5, function declarations are counted as input tokens.
Preview (labeled 'Gemini 3 Flash Preview'). Text/image/video input; audio input is $1/1M. No non-global surcharge shown; Global applies. Cached input $0.05 (text/image/video).

Non-global (EU) pricing, in effect from 2026-07-01; Global is $0.25 in / $1.50 out. Text/image/video input; audio input $0.55 (non-global) / $0.50 (Global). Cached input $0.0275 (non-global) / $0.025 (Global).
Standard tier, <=200K input tokens; >200K tier is $2.50 in / $15 out. 2.x family is global (no EU surcharge). Cached input $0.13 (<=200K) / $0.25 (>200K).

Offered in EU Multi-Region (eu) and US Multi-Region; NOT in europe-west1. Cache hit $0.22 (promo). Batch $1.10 in / $5.50 out (promo).
